title: Senior Financial Analyst - Shriram Finance - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Shriram Finance - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Shriram Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Shriram Finance:
Shriram Finance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shriram Finance!
